name: Cheesy Tuna & Noodles
recipeIngredient: 8 3/8 oz chicken flavor ramen noodle soup
10 3/4 oz low-fat cream of mushroom soup
6 oz tuna in water, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions. Add seasoning packets and drain off most liquid; set aside.
2. In a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, cook olive oil in hot oil.
3. Cook vegetables and garlic for 2 minutes, stirring often.
4. Stir in mushroom soup, mozzarella cheese, milk, and black pepper.
5. Cook until cheese melts, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in reserved noodles and tuna. Heat through, stirring occasionally.
